description: Multi-source home furnishing CLI combining 5 Tier 1 APIs: search, compare, stores, delivery, reviews, and deals — category-routed across Ferguson, West Elm, Rejuvenation, Article, and 5+ Shopify DTC stores. No API keys required.

novel_features.name: Compound Category Search
novel_features.description: Room-type shortcuts that expand to multi-category fan-outs across the relevant source fleet.

novel_features.name: Price Watch
novel_features.description: SQLite price history with cron-friendly polling and threshold alerts across all sources.

novel_features.name: Project Tracker
novel_features.description: Named project grouping with cross-store budget tracking.

novel_features.name: Stale Detector
novel_features.description: Re-fetches saved products to detect discontinuation, out-of-stock, and price changes.

novel_features.name: Spec Sheet Export
novel_features.description: Normalized product specs from unstructured retailer pages.

novel_features.name: Brand Cross-Reference
novel_features.description: Cross-retailer brand availability and price comparison.

novel_features.name: Review Aggregation
novel_features.description: Cross-source review merging plus external review site integration.
